Synopsis: Designates "New Jersey State Song" as State song.
Designates Earth Day week each year as Litter Law Enforcement Week for special effort to enforce littering laws.
Designates State Highway Route 72 as "Burlington-Ocean Purple Heart Memorial Highway."
Establishes Division of Advocacy for Developmentally Disabled within Office of Public Defender; designates public defender for developmentally disabled clients in criminal cases.
Designates Eid Ul-Fitr and Eid Ul-Adha as State and public holidays.
Designates portion of State Highway Route No. 35 as "Chosin Few Memorial Highway."
Designates portion of Interstate Route 280 in West Orange as "Governor Brendan Byrne Memorial Highway."
Designates each community college in State as provider of allowable services under SNAP Employment and Training Program.
Designates cranberry juice as State juice.*

Designates blueberry muffin as State Muffin.
Designates "Suicide Awareness & Remembrance Flag" as official State flag.
Designates Morris Plains rail station as "Frank J. Druetzler Station - Morris Plains, New Jersey."
Designates Common Eastern Bumble Bee as New Jersey State Native Pollinator.
Transfers Division of Elections from Department of State to Department of Law and Public Safety; designates Attorney General as chief election official and requires two bipartisan co-directors.
Designates franklinite as official mineral of State of NJ.

Designates State Office of Emergency Management as State Agency for Surplus Property.
